etymology.description: đ §Ş is a variant form of ĺŤŁ (yÇ’u, 'a type of ancient vessel') -> used interchangeably with ĺŤŁ
etymology.interpretation: The character đ §Ş is an alternative form of ĺŤŁ, an ancient Chinese wine or liquids container, used in rituals. Although it shows similar structure to other vessel characters, it does not hold distinct meaning beyond its variant function.
